title: Modular Cable Management Clips
description:
Keep your desk tidy with these stackable, snap-fit cable management clips. Designed to mount on the underside of a desk with a single screw or double-sided tape.

## Features

- Snap-fit design — no tools needed to add or remove cables
- Stackable: clips nest together for multi-cable runs
- Two sizes included: **narrow (up to 6mm)** and **wide (up to 12mm)**
- Rounded edges to avoid cable wear

## Print Settings

- **Layer height:** 0.2mm
- **Infill:** 20% gyroid
- **Walls:** 3
- **Supports:** No
- **Material:** PETG recommended (PLA works too)

## Assembly

1. Print as many clips as you need.
2. Mount the base to the underside of your desk.
3. Press cables into the slot — the clip flexes open and snaps shut.
4. Stack additional clips on top if running multiple cables.

## Notes

If the snap feels too stiff or too loose, adjust wall count by ±1. Tested on a 25mm thick desk.
